subject: [PATCH v3 1/3] fuse: fix missing barrier when checking io-uring readiness

2026-07-16.patch_summary: This patch fixes a missing barrier in the FUSE kernel module, which can lead to a CPU observing that io-uring initialization is complete before it actually is. This can cause a deadlock that was previously fixed by commit 3393ff964e0f. The patch adds an smp_rmb() barrier to pair with the existing smp_wmb() in fuse_chan_set_initialized(), ensuring that the two loads are properly ordered and preventing the deadlock.
